src: A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥
ja: 各種LLMをOpenAI互換・Claude互換・Gemini互換形式に相互変換できる、統合AIモデルハブ。個人・企業向けモデル管理の一元的なゲートウェイ。🍥
